repos.name: opencode-manager

repos.description_zh: OpenCode AI代理的移动优先网络界面。使用任何设备（手机、平板电脑或台式机）的多个OpenCode代理进行管理、控制和编码。具有Git集成、文件管理和响应式PWA中的实时聊天功能。使用Docker进行部署以进行即时设置。

repos.name: shepherd
repos.description: A runtime substrate that turns an agent's execution into a reversible, Git-like trace, so meta-agents can observe, fork, replay, and revert any run. Couples agent and environments in a copy-on-write fork ~5x faster than docker commit, with ~95% KV-cache reuse on replay. Framework built for meta-agents to supervise, optimize, and train other agents
repos.description_zh: 一个运行时底层，将代理的执行转换为可逆的、类似Git的跟踪，以便元代理可以观察、分叉、重播和恢复任何运行。将代理和环境结合在写时复制叉中，速度比docker提交快5倍，重播时可重复使用约95%的KV缓存。为元代理构建的框架来监督、优化和培训其他代理

repos.name: arsenal-ng
repos.description: The classic launcher, evolved. Fast, Go-based command library equipped with 200+ cybersecurity cheat-sheets. Just install and start hacking.
repos.description_zh: 经典的发射器，不断进化。快速、基于Go的命令库配备了200多份网络安全备忘单。只需安装并开始黑客攻击即可。

Optional DataForSEO, Firecrawl, and Banana extensions.
